name: dfa-variability
description: Detrended Fluctuation Analysis (DFA) and Multifractal DFA (MFDFA) for JavaScript — measure fractal scaling, Hurst exponent, long-range correlations, 1/f noise, multifractal spectrum, and HRV variability in time series data. Computes alpha, alpha1, alpha2, generalised Hurst h(q), SDNN, RMSSD, and PNN50.
author: Dmitry Paranyushkin <contact@noduslabs.com> (http://noduslabs.com)
